pattern: Fail: {pica8CheckText <Count: 1000 lines> Failed, the result is not expected as below:
cause: 需要修改脚本预期行为.MAC同步只发生在两端link-id匹配的MLAG接口之间,当两端link-id不匹配时,不会重新下mac到peer-link
step_info: Step 5: Change mlag1 link-id as 3 in dut1, check state and mac of mlag1 and mlag2, result5, run clear mac address table

pattern: pica8CheckText.*Failed, the result is not expected
cause: iptables规则检查未通过，预期内容与实际不匹配
solution: 检查switch1上iptables规则是否正确配置，修改脚本的正则匹配规则
step_info: Step 4: Check ssh on switch2 and check iptable routes on switch1

pattern: pica8CheckText.*Failed, the result is not expected as below
cause: 检查IPv6报文转发或MAC地址匹配时，期望的报文内容未在指定端口收到
solution: 检查DUT1的te1接口IPv6转发配置及对端设备连接状态
step_info: Step 7: send ipv6 packets to te1 of dut1,result4
